definition: To bring something to a person or place
hint: 郵便屋さんが手紙を届けるイメージだよ！

definition: To keep someone or something safe from danger
hint: ヒーローが街を守るイメージ！

definition: More than two but not very many
hint: 1個でも2個でもない、数個ってこと！

definition: Feeling very happy and full of energy about something
hint: クリスマスの朝のワクワクした気持ち！
translation: ワクワクした、興奮した

definition: To complete something or bring it to an end
hint: マラソンのゴールのイメージ！

definition: To not be able to find something
hint: 消しゴムがどこかに行っちゃった！

definition: Not in the place where you expect it to be
hint: 見つからない、いなくなったということ！
translation: 見つからない、行方不明の

definition: To start to be something
hint: 大きくなったら何になる？

definition: Making you laugh or smile
hint: お笑い芸人はこれが得意！

definition: To decide what you are going to do and how to do it
hint: 旅行に行く前にやることだよ！
translation: 計画する、予定を立てる

definition: To go up something like a mountain or a tree
hint: 山のてっぺんを目指す！

definition: Having a lot of people in one place
hint: お祭りの時の電車の中みたい！
translation: 混雑した、人でいっぱいの

definition: To get something that someone gives or sends to you
hint: お誕生日にプレゼントをもらう！

definition: Liked or enjoyed by many people
hint: みんなに大人気ってこと！
translation: 人気のある、人気がある

definition: Quickly and without warning
hint: びっくりするくらい急に！

definition: To ask someone to come to a party or event
hint: パーティーの招待状を送るよ！

definition: The number of people living in a place
hint: この街に住んでいる人は全部で何人？

definition: To stop a machine or light from working
hint: 寝る前に電気を消すよ！

definition: To learn about a subject by reading or practicing
hint: テストの前にやること！

definition: To choose what to do after thinking about it
hint: どっちにしようかな〜って考えた後にすること！

definition: To go somewhere and collect someone, usually by car
hint: お母さんが駅まで車で来てくれる！
translation: 迎えに行く、拾い上げる

definition: Extremely good; making you feel very happy
hint: 最高！すばらしい！って感じ！

definition: To use money to buy things or use time doing something
hint: お小遣いを使う、時間をかけるということ！

definition: A lower price than the usual one
hint: セールで安くなること！

definition: To try to find something or someone
hint: 落とし物を探すときにすること！

definition: Feeling unhappy because you think something bad might happen
hint: テストの結果が気になって不安…

definition: After a long time or after many difficulties
hint: やっと！ついに！

definition: To give something to someone for a short time
hint: 友達にノートを貸してあげる！

definition: Finding something new or learning something for the first time
hint: コロンブスがアメリカ大陸を見つけたみたいに！

definition: To become a member of a group or to do an activity with others
hint: サッカー部に入る！

definition: To look after someone or something
hint: ペットのお世話をするよ！

definition: Extremely good or attractive
hint: すごい！最高！って叫びたくなる！

definition: To become hard and solid because of very cold temperature
hint: 冬になると水が氷になるよ！

definition: To feel happy and excited about something that is going to happen
hint: 遠足が楽しみ！ってとき！

definition: To hold something and take it from one place to another
hint: 重い荷物を持って歩く！

definition: To tell someone that you will definitely do something
hint: 指切りげんまん！

definition: Something bad that happens by chance, causing damage or injury
hint: 車がぶつかっちゃった…

definition: Without difficulty or effort
hint: かんたんに、らくらく！

definition: To help someone learn something by giving them information
hint: 学校の先生がやること！

definition: Things that you throw away because you do not want them
hint: 毎朝ゴミ箱に入れるもの！

definition: Using the phone to talk to someone
hint: スマホで友達と話してるよ！

definition: To learn or discover a fact or piece of information
hint: 答えがわかった！見つけた！

definition: To write information in the blank spaces on a form
hint: 申し込み用紙に名前を書く！

definition: Wanting to know more about something
hint: もっと知りたい！ってワクワクする気持ち！

definition: To get things from different places and bring them together
hint: 切手やカードを集めるのが好き！

definition: Having a large distance from one side to the other
hint: 大きな川の横幅のイメージ！

definition: In the place of something or someone else
hint: ケーキの代わりにアイスを食べよう！

definition: To make a drawing or plan of something that will be made
hint: お洋服や建物をかっこよく作る計画！
translation: デザインする、設計する

definition: To make an effort to do something
hint: やってみよう！チャレンジ！

definition: Not open for business or visitors
hint: お店のドアに「CLOSED」って書いてある！
translation: 閉まっている、休業中の

definition: Doing things quickly because you do not have much time
hint: 遅刻しそうで走ってる！

definition: In the beginning, before other things happened
hint: 最初は怖かったけど、今は平気！

definition: To be able to do something well
hint: サッカーが上手！って褒められる！

definition: To do something wrong or incorrect
hint: テストで計算を間違えちゃった！

definition: Before now or before a particular time
hint: もう終わったよ！って時に使う！

definition: To be involved in an activity or event with other people
hint: マラソン大会に参加する！

definition: To move through the air using wings
hint: 鳥が空を飛んでいる！

definition: To give information to someone by speaking
hint: 秘密を友達に教える！

definition: Making you feel very surprised and upset
hint: びっくり！信じられない！

definition: For a short period of time
hint: ちょっとの間、しばらく！

definition: The most important city of a country, where the government is
hint: 日本なら東京、アメリカならワシントンD.C.！

definition: To go from one side of something to the other
hint: 横断歩道を渡る！

definition: To take something from someone and give it back later
hint: 図書館で本を借りる！

definition: Knowledge or skill that you get from doing something
hint: いろんなことをやって身につくもの！

definition: To use something carelessly without a good purpose
hint: 食べ物を残したらもったいない！

definition: To be known by many people because of something special
hint: 富士山は世界的に有名！

definition: To check that something is true or has been done
hint: 忘れ物がないかチェック！

definition: To have no more of something left to sell
hint: 人気商品が全部売り切れ！

definition: Big in size or amount
hint: ピザのLサイズ！

definition: Happening quickly and without warning
hint: 急にドアが開いた！

definition: To have the same opinion as someone else
hint: 「うん、そうだね！」って言うこと！

definition: Having nothing inside
hint: 冷蔵庫に何も入ってない！

definition: Giving a lot of attention to what you are doing
hint: ていねいに、慎重に！

definition: To cover something by putting paper or cloth around it
hint: プレゼントをきれいな紙で包む！

definition: Alone, without help from anyone
hint: 自分ひとりの力で！

definition: At any time; it does not matter when
hint: いつでもどうぞ！

definition: Up until now (used in negative sentences and questions)
hint: まだ宿題やってないの？

definition: To go to a place or person for a short time
hint: おじいちゃんの家に遊びに行く！

definition: To change something slightly so that it works better or fits better
hint: 新しい環境に慣れる！

definition: A person who flies an airplane
hint: 飛行機を操縦する人！

definition: To let someone else use or have part of something
hint: おやつを友達と半分こ！

definition: To pick one thing from several options
hint: メニューからひとつ選ぶ！

definition: To see or become aware of something
hint: あ！気づいた！って時！

definition: Always telling the truth and not cheating
hint: ウソをつかない正直者！

definition: Making you feel relaxed and at ease
hint: ふかふかのソファに座った時の気持ち！

definition: To go behind someone or do what someone says
hint: 先生の後についていく！

definition: Something that you did not expect to happen
hint: サプライズパーティー！びっくり！

definition: Having great value or meaning
hint: とても大事！忘れちゃダメ！

definition: Not the same as something else
hint: 双子だけど性格は全然ちがう！

definition: To want something to happen and think it is possible
hint: 明日晴れるといいな！

definition: To make something ready for use or for an event
hint: テスト勉強の準備をしよう！

definition: To look at two things to find how they are similar or different
hint: どっちが大きいか並べてみよう！

definition: Following customs that have continued for a long time
hint: お正月のおせち料理みたいに昔からの習慣！

definition: To do something again and again to get better at it
hint: ピアノは毎日練習！

definition: To make something better than it was before
hint: テストの点数がアップ！

definition: To be important or have significance
hint: 大事なこと、重要なことだよ！

definition: To get bigger or taller over time
hint: ひまわりがぐんぐん伸びる！

definition: To say that someone can do something; to permit
hint: お母さんが「いいよ」って許可してくれる！

definition: To answer someone who has spoken or written to you
hint: LINEのメッセージに返信！

definition: An opinion about what someone should do
hint: 先輩からのアドバイス！

definition: To tell someone your idea about what they could do
hint: 「こうしたらどう？」って提案する！

definition: What happens because of an action or situation
hint: テストの点数が出た！

definition: To make a choice about something after thinking
hint: チョコかバニラか決めた！

definition: To become visible or come into view
hint: 虹が空に現れた！

definition: To keep doing something without stopping
hint: ゲームをやめずにずっと続ける！

definition: To have information in your mind from the past
hint: 去年の夏休みを思い出す！

definition: To think that something is true or real
hint: サンタさんを信じる！

definition: To make something clear so people can understand it
hint: 算数の問題をわかりやすく教える！

definition: To reach a place after traveling
hint: 電車が駅に到着！

definition: To have the same opinion as another person
hint: 「うん、そうだね！」って言うこと！

definition: To go back to a place or give something back
hint: 借りた本を図書館に返す！

definition: To fix something that is broken or damaged
hint: 壊れたおもちゃを直す！

definition: To cook food in an oven using heat
hint: オーブンでクッキーを焼く！

definition: To grow or change into something bigger or more advanced
hint: 技術がどんどん進歩する！

definition: To look at something to see if it is correct or safe
hint: テストの答えをもう一回見直す！
translation: 確認する、チェックする

definition: To finish doing or making something
hint: パズルの最後のピースをはめる！

definition: To make something that is broken work again
hint: お父さんが壊れた棚を直す！

definition: To give an answer without being sure it is right
hint: 当てずっぽうで答える！

definition: To tell someone another person's name when they first meet
hint: 「こちらは〇〇さんです」って紹介する！

definition: To move your legs faster than walking
hint: 運動会のかけっこ！

definition: Something you must have or do; needed
hint: 水は生きるために必要！

definition: Able to be done or to happen
hint: できるかもしれない！やってみよう！

definition: Found or happening often; not rare
hint: 日本ではお米を食べるのは普通のこと！

definition: Helping you do something; having a practical use
hint: この道具があると便利！

definition: Kind, calm, and careful in the way you behave
hint: 小さい赤ちゃんをやさしく抱っこ！

definition: Extremely large in size or amount
hint: 恐竜みたいにめっちゃ大きい！

definition: Able to wait calmly without getting angry
hint: 行列でも怒らずにじっと待てる！

definition: Not in danger; protected from harm
hint: シートベルトで安全！

definition: Not wanting to work or be active
hint: 日曜日にゴロゴロ〜

definition: Unusual or difficult to understand
hint: なんか変だな？って思うこと！

definition: To take place, especially without being planned
hint: 何が起きたの？って聞くとき！

definition: To say you are willing to do something for someone
hint: 「手伝おうか？」って言ってくれる！

definition: To like one thing more than another
hint: 犬と猫なら猫が好き！

definition: To stay in the same place or condition
hint: 席に残ってて！動かないで！

definition: To suddenly understand something you did not know before
hint: あ！そういうことか！って気づく！

definition: To show your feelings or thoughts using words or actions
hint: 絵を描いて気持ちを表す！

definition: To tell people about something officially
hint: 校長先生が放送でお知らせ！

definition: To be present at an event or place
hint: 授業に出席する！

definition: To need something or make it necessary
hint: この仕事にはパソコンが必要！

definition: To act or speak for a person or group
hint: クラスの代表として発表する！

definition: Used to introduce a new topic in conversation
hint: 「ところでさ〜」って話題を変える！

definition: Immediately, without any delay
hint: 今すぐ！待たないで！

definition: Not less than a particular number or amount
hint: 最低でもこれくらいは！

definition: Immediately when something happens
hint: 帰ったらすぐに！

definition: Starting from this moment and continuing into the future
hint: 今日からずっと！これからは！

definition: To give something to a teacher or person in charge
hint: 宿題を先生に提出！

definition: To actually happen after being wished for or dreamed about
hint: 夢が叶った！

definition: To be decided or influenced by something
hint: 天気次第で変わるよ！

definition: To stop trying to do something because it is too hard
hint: もうムリ…ってやめちゃうこと。ダメだよ！

definition: To place clothing or accessories on your body
hint: 帽子をかぶる、靴を履く！

definition: Despite the fact that; even though
hint: 雨だったけど楽しかった！「けど」の意味！

definition: Except if; only when something does not happen
hint: 勉強しないと合格できないよ！

definition: Used to show two possibilities or choices
hint: 行くか行かないか〜どっちかな？

definition: At any time that; every time that
hint: いつでもOK！好きな時に！

definition: During the time that something else is happening
hint: ご飯を作っている間にテレビを見る！

definition: From one side to the other side of something
hint: トンネルを通り抜ける！

definition: Throughout a period of time or event
hint: 授業中はおしゃべり禁止！

definition: In the direction of something or someone
hint: 学校に向かって歩く！

definition: In opposition to or competing with someone
hint: サッカーで相手チームと戦う！

definition: In the space separating two things or people
hint: 私とあなたの間の秘密！
